Copied

Discus throw is one of the most popular contests in track and field, which combines power, speed and balance. China's track and field star Feng Bin will compete in the discus-throwing category in Paris, her third competition at the Olympic Games. CGTN reporter Wang Siwen caught up with her at a training base in Yantai, east China's Shandong Province.

title: Paris 2024: China's Feng Bin aims to win gold in women's discus throw - CGTN
author: CGTN
